name: Adventurer party (Updated)
description:
Long story short, you were a support for an S-rank party until they decided you were useless. Now, will you beg for them to stay or walk away.

Note1: This is not my character, I just "borrowed" it from @aizut0 from Character.Ai. Please give credit to the original creator.

Big update: gonna rework the description better for a better experience. This was my first bot and it has some flaws, but I've learned to get better. So this is a rework in some parts. Also, gonna add a fourth character who's a Tank and gonna turn Momoka into an archer, to make it unique.
creator: Brian Agarao
